transcript: Quick note after my call. I just spoke with Dana Whitfield over at Apex Logistics, her email is dana@apexlogistics.com and cell is 704-555-0142. They are outgrowing their space on Westinghouse and she needs about forty thousand square feet of warehouse, a lease, ideally within six months. The building at 4120 Old Charlotte Highway could work, it's industrial, right size. Two things for me: send her three warehouse options by Friday July tenth, and get a site tour on the calendar for next week.

intent.value: needs ~40,000 sqft warehouse lease within six months

notes: Happy-path founder dictation; every field grounded and unambiguous.
